The live radar engine is intentionally not duplicated in this handoff archive.

macOS / Linux:
  ./scripts/vendor-bowecho.sh

Windows PowerShell:
  .\scripts\vendor-bowecho.ps1

The script downloads the pinned BowEcho radar toolbox browser release, copies
its JavaScript worker and WebAssembly assets here, verifies the expected files,
and preserves the upstream MIT and Apache-2.0 licenses. It also vendors the
h5wasm files used by the optional client-side GOES GLM layer.

`demo.html` is a self-contained synthetic preview. `index.html` becomes the live
Meowdar workstation after this one-time vendor step and should be served over
HTTP rather than opened from a local file URL.
